ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop */,
  "direction_id" TEXT /* Direction of the stop (e.g., W, E) */,
  "stop_name" TEXT /* Name of the stop */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the stop is located */,
  "order_number" INTEGER /* Order of the stop in the route */,
  "is_green_line" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the stop serves the Green Line */,
  "is_red_line" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the stop serves the Red Line */,
  "is_blue_line" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the stop serves the Blue Line */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the stop */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the stop */,
  "platform_number" INTEGER /* Platform number where the stop is located */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available at the stop (e.g., elevators, escalators, benches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stops_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "station_descriptive_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the station */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Time the station opens */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Time the station closes */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available at the station (e.g., restrooms, shops, ticket counters) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers the station can handle at a time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the line the route belongs to */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the route */,
  "average_travel_time" TEXT /* Average time it takes to complete the route */,
  "peak_hours" TEXT /* Peak hours for the route (e.g., morning, evening) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the line */,
  "line_color" TEXT /* Color of the line */,
  "length" REAL /* Total length of the line in kilometers */,
  "number_of_stops" INTEGER /* Total number of stops on the line */,
  "number_of_trains" INTEGER /* Number of trains assigned to the line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trains" (
  "train_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each train */,
  "train_number" TEXT /* Number of the train */,
  "current_route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current route the train is on */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the train (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "manufactured_date" TEXT /* Date the train was manufactured */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service or maintenance */,
  "next_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled service */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers the train can carry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trains_current_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop */,
  "scheduled_arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time at the stop */,
  "scheduled_departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time from the stop */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time based on real-time data */,
  "estimated_departure_time" TEXT /* Estimated departure time based on real-time data */,
  "is_cancelled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the schedule is cancelled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_time_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real-time data entry */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "current_stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current stop */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time at the stop */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time from the stop */,
  "delay_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the train is delayed */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time based on real-time data */,
  "estimated_departure_time" TEXT /* Estimated departure time based on real-time data */,
  "is_delayed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the train is delayed */,
  "reason_for_delay" TEXT /* Description of the reason for the delay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_data_current_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_data_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operations manager, maintenance staff, customer service) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
